ops.text:
E26 (probe stage only) — chosen/rejected edit-distance distribution. Cap $0 (pure compute, no LLM spend). Gates Wave-2 DPO/DPOP/KTO bake-off spend.

PRE-REGISTERED PROTOCOL
- Hypothesis frame: DPO degrades when chosen ≈ rejected (DPO-Positive, arXiv:2402.13228); the DPOP fix is warranted only if a substantial share of pairs sit in the small-edit risk regime.
- Data: read-only snapshot _base-20260719/dataset/dpo/{train,test}.parquet (470 train / 48 test rows), cloned cp -c into E26/inputs/. Each row: chosen = render_edit(correction_file, correcting_old, correcting_new); rejected = render_edit(file, faulted_old, faulted_new) (cc_steer/export.py:477-492, rendering.py:78). Metric operates on the single assistant-message content string of chosen vs rejected.
- Metric: token-level normalized Levenshtein d = Lev(tok(chosen), tok(rejected)) / max(|tok(chosen)|, |tok(rejected)|), range [0,1]; empty-vs-empty = 0.
- PRIMARY tokenizer: Qwen/Qwen3-8B subword tokenizer (the training/Tinker base model — the token space DPO actually operates in), loaded offline from HF cache (HF_HUB_OFFLINE=1). SENSITIVITY tokenizers: word/punctuation regex, and characters.
- PRE-REGISTERED THRESHOLD: small-edit iff d < 0.20 (DPOP risk regime).
- Primary population: DPO train (470). Also report test (48) and combined (518).
- Report: n_pairs, distance quantiles {min,p5,p10,p25,p50,p75,p90,p95,max}, histogram, small_edit_share + nonparametric bootstrap 95% CI (10k resamples, seed=26).
- PRE-REGISTERED DECISION FEED: small_edit_share (primary tokenizer, train) >= 0.30 → DPO/DPOP/KTO bake-off warranted; < 0.30 → recommend skipping DPOP.

SUCCESS CRITERION: emit distance distribution + small_edit_share point estimate + bootstrap CI on the primary tokenizer, and state the explicit bake-off recommendation. Raw per-pair artifacts kept for verify-lane re-derivation.
